items.name: finstream-metaopt
items.description: Implementation of an adaptive machine learning system for non-stationary financial data streams. The framework combines temporally diverse ensemble models with meta-heuristic optimization to dynamically adjust model influence under concept drift.

items.name: CarbonAware_CropPrediction_using_DevOps
items.description: A Carbon-Aware DevOps framework designed to optimize energy efficiency in AI-driven crop yield prediction. This project implements GreenOps principles to minimize the environmental footprint of machine learning pipelines while maintaining high predictive accuracy for sustainable agriculture.

items.name: ModelingToolkit.jl
items.description: An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

items.name: freight-rail-delay-prediction
items.description: This project investigates short-term arrival delay time prediction in freight rail operations using historical operational datasets and machine learning models. The framework captures delay propagation patterns to enhance prediction accuracy, improve operational efficiency, and assist decision-making in freight rail network management.

items.name: quantum-tensor-networks-circuits
items.description: Quantum Tensor Networks Circuits is a modular framework for building and benchmarking variational quantum circuits based on tensor networks. The framework allows for various encoding methods and ansatz topologies, thus enabling the comparison of their precision and expressibility in quantum machine learning applications.

items.name: Masters-Thesis-Development-of-A-Model-Predictive-Control-Strategy-For-E-Trailers
items.description: This thesis project presents the development of a tractor-independent control strategy for electrically propelled trailers (E-trailers) based on a Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) framework augmented with trip-based energy optimization and machine-learning-based tractor behavior estimation.

items.name: ppmi-ontology-alignment
items.description: Framework for aligning longitudinal Parkinson’s Progression Markers Initiative (PPMI) data with the Parkinson’s Disease Ontology (PDON) and Movement Disorder Ontology (PMDO). Provides reproducible mapping, ontology instantiation, and ontology-informed machine learning workflows for analysing Parkinson’s disease trajectories.

items.name: zerfoo
items.description: Pure Go machine learning framework. Train, run, and serve ML models with go build. Zero CGo.

items.name: Skin-disease-classification-with-an-ensemble-machine-learning-technique
items.description: his project focuses on enhancing the accuracy and efficiency of skin disease classification by leveraging a lightweight ensemble machine learning framework. The proposed approach combines multiple traditional classifiers—k-Nearest Neighbors (k-NN), Decision Tree (DT), and Gradient Boosting Machine (GBM)

items.name: Improved-Molecular-Graph-Aggregation-Strategies-for-Robust-Prediction-of-ADME
items.description: In this study, we present a systematic benchmarking framework to evaluate molecular representation strategies for ADME prediction, comparing classical descriptor-based machine learning models with graph neural network (GNN) architectures implemented within a message passing and aggregation paradigm.
